HGSS.685.0001:
Hey, you’re trying to be the ultimate
Trainer, too? That makes us comrades!\f
If I find any more items by the water,
I’ll give you some.\f
Just give me your phone number. [0200,0000]
HGSS.685.0002:
You’ll be hearing from me if I find
something good.
HGSS.685.0003:
Is that so? Then I’ll just have to use
them myself.
HGSS.685.0004:
If I find any more items by the water,
I’ll give you some.\f
Just give me your phone number.[0200,0000]
HGSS.685.0005:
Hey, there you are!
Here’s a gift, as promised!\f
HGSS.685.0006:
Hey, if you’re nearby, come and chat
with me in person!
HGSS.685.0007:
My [0100,000A,0000] has grown again.\f
It was only about so big when I caught
it, but now it’s way bigger.\f
Oh yeah, I KO’d a wild [0100,000B,0000].
It was huge--like THIS big, even.\f
Heh, I guess you can’t tell over
the phone...\f
Well, I’ll be seeing you.
HGSS.685.0008:
My [0100,000A,0000] has grown again.\f
It was only about so big when I caught
it, but now it’s way bigger.\f
Oh yeah, I lost a wild [0100,000B,0000].
It was huge--like THIS big, even.\f
Heh, I guess you can’t tell over
the phone...\f
Well, I’ll be seeing you.
HGSS.685.0009:
We should get a battle going!\f
I’ll be fishing on [0104,0003,0000].
Swing by if you have time.
HGSS.685.0010:
What? Are you lost or something?
Our battle will be on [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.685.0011:
Have I found anything good?
Nope, not yet.\f
It’s like fishing--you need patience.
HGSS.685.0012:
I picked up a cool little thing at the
water’s edge. As promised, it’s yours.\r
I’ll be waiting on [0104,0003,0000].
HGSS.685.0013:
I’ve got something good for you.
Hurry over to [0104,0003,0000].
